author: mark
text:
delivery_remote: unfiltered fetch fallback on filter reject

ensure_cache asked for --filter=blob:none unconditionally, a hard failure on older servers (pre-7.x Bitbucket Server, gitea before partial-clone, plain git daemon) that reject the filter outright rather than degrading to a warning. Cross-repo delivery resolution was unusable for those operators.

Capture fetch/clone stderr via .output(); when it carries a recognized filter-rejection signature, retry once unfiltered (paying full blobs) and note the degraded fetch. A genuinely-unreachable URL has no such signature and still fails on the first attempt, so it pays no second round-trip.
